title.default: Amazing-Vibe - Interactive Vibe Coding Tool Collection

Layout.description: Amazing-Vibe provides a curated collection of interactive tools and demos for vibe coding enthusiasts, covering strategy games, visual utilities, calculators and more.

openGraph.title: Amazing-Vibe - Interactive Vibe Coding Tool Collection
openGraph.description: A curated collection of interactive tools and demos for vibe coding.

Footer.description: A curated collection of interactive tools for vibe coding enthusiasts.
Footer.aboutText: Amazing-Vibe is an open-source collection of interactive tools and demos, designed to provide lightweight, engaging web experiences for vibe coding enthusiasts.
Footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: All tools on this website are for educational and entertainment purposes only. Content is for reference and does not constitute professional advice.

HomePage.heroDescription: Lightweight, self-contained HTML5 interactive tools that turn ideas into engaging hands-on experiences.
HomePage.memoDesc: Track daily todos with date scheduling, weekly reports, and cloud sync.
HomePage.gomokuDesc: An Excel-disguised online Gomoku game. Create a room and invite a friend.

Gomoku.title: Excel Gomoku
